system.description:
Kill-teams move with a deadly precision across the battlefield, covering each other as they advance and crossing ground swiftly from cover to cover. While this ability is in effect, the Kill-team may use their Reactions to make a Tactical Advance.

RankImprovement
3Calling for a Squad Advance becomes a Free Action
system.effect: Kill-team may use Reactions to make a Tactical Advance

improvements.effect: Calling for a Squad Advance becomes a Free Action
